title: Public Guardianship/Conservatorship Programs - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Foster Families > Public Guardianship/Conservatorship Programs 2 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF MULTNOMAH COUNTY AGING DISABILITY AND VETERANS SERVICES DIVISION CENTRAL OFFICE PUBLIC GUARDIAN AND CONSERVATOR PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Obtains and implements court-appointed guardianship and/or conservatorship. Service includes assistance and oversight of healthcare, housing, and finances. Family members and other interested parties may petition the court to become guardians or conservators. 209 SW 4th Avenue Suite 510 Portland, OR 97204 Eligibility: Adults who are profoundly mentally incapacitated, unable to care for themselves, and currently at high risk due to abuse, exploitation or extreme self-neglect Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 988-4567 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OREGON STATE OFFICE OF THE LONG-TERM CARE OMBUDSMAN OREGON PUBLIC GUARDIAN Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Serves as court-appointed, alternate decision makers for adults incapable of making some or most of the decisions necessary for their basic care and safety. The program is a last resort and is only used when there is no less restrictive option available for addressing a serious safety risk and no eligible alternative guardian is available. 830 D Street NE Salem, OR 973011212 Eligibility: Individualas who fall into one of the following three priorities: -Individuals at imminent or ongoing chronic risk of serious harm or death due to their circumstances and incapacity -Individuals who are momentarily safe, but are currently held in a medical or psychiatric hospital and are unable to be safely discharged without the oversight of a guardian -Individuals currently living in an independent living situation (own home or rental) who will not be able to safely maintain in that living situation on their own, but could continue to do so safely with guardian oversight Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 378-6848 Get Directions Visit Website More Details MULTNOMAH COUNTY AGING DISABILITY AND VETERANS SERVICES DIVISION PUBLIC GUARDIAN AND CONSERVATOR PROGRAM OREGON STATE OFFICE OF THE LONG-TERM CARE OMBUDSMAN OREGON PUBLIC GUARDIAN
